Communications Data
Source
Members provide communications data whenever sending messages, media files, or other communications to other Members using the App's Member-to-Member messaging functions. Members also provide communication data whenever communicating with FEELD representatives, including when filing complaints, reports, or App-related requests.

Age Estimation and Identity Verification Notice
As part of our efforts to provide a safe and protected Feeld experience, Feeld will collect and process your facial biometric data and cellular mobile network operator data through a trusted third party (Yoti) in conjunction with our other Customer Support applications and platforms. Age verification provided by Yoti will be implemented to (a) ensure that everyone using our platform is 18 years old or older; and (b) help prevent any fraudulent or malicious actors from accessing Feeld services. In the event of support ticket escalations, Members may elect to provide a valid government identification card for age verification purposes. If a Member elects to provide government ID data, said data will only be processed for the limited purpose of verifying the Member's age and shall be purged from storage immediately after verification is complete. You can find Yoti's Biometric Policy as linked herein.
